keyPoints: The E-Waste (Management) Amendment Rules, 2023, 2024 came into effect in India, aiming to improve the management and disposal of electronic waste.
Textbook 1 (CH-6) highlights the importance of e-waste management and the consequences of improper disposal.
Textbook 2 (CH-2) emphasizes the role of government policies in regulating e-waste management.
E-Resource 3 provides information on the steps taken by the government to promote e-waste recycling and dispose of hazardous materials properly.
